prompt:
You are implementing a Vue 3 registration form in a Turborepo monorepo.

## Task

Implement TWO files **in this order**:

1. `apps/web/src/registration/types/index.ts` — Zod schema + TypeScript type
2. `apps/web/src/registration/components/RegistrationForm.vue` — Vue SFC using the `elements` package

Write `types/index.ts` **first** so that RegistrationForm.vue can import from it.
Use `write_file` to write each file, then `run_compilation` to check for TypeScript errors.
`write_file` only writes the file and returns `"File written."` — it does NOT compile.
After each write, call `run_compilation` to get feedback and fix any errors before moving on.

**Use `query_rag` to look up component API examples before writing any code.** The tool has code examples for all available form components and patterns.

### Required fields

| Field       | Component             | Constraints                                                                 |
|-------------|----------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `username`  | ControlledInput       | required, min 3 chars                                                       |
| `email`     | ControlledInput       | type="email", required, valid email                                         |
| `role`      | ControlledRadioGroup  | options: "user", "admin", "contributor"                                    |
| `otherInfo` | ControlledInput       | visible only when `role === "contributor"`                                  |
| `newsletter`| ControlledCheckbox    |                                                                             |
| `frequency` | ControlledRadioGroup  | options: "daily", "weekly", "monthly"; visible only when `newsletter` true  |
| `bio`       | ControlledTextarea    | optional                                                                    |

### Conditional validation

Use Zod `.superRefine()` for cross-field rules:
- `otherInfo` required when `role === "contributor"`
- `frequency` required when `newsletter === true`

args.answer:
Successfully implemented both files:

1. `apps/web/src/registration/types/index.ts` - Zod schema with:
   - username: required, min 3 chars
   - email: required, valid email
   - role: enum [user, admin, contributor]
   - otherInfo: optional (required via superRefine when role === 'contributor')
   - newsletter: optional boolean
   - frequency: enum [daily, weekly, monthly] (required via superRefine when newsletter === true)
   - bio: optional string
   - TypeScript type RegistrationFormValues
   - registrationInitialValues object

2. `apps/web/src/registration/components/RegistrationForm.vue` - Vue SFC using elements package with:
   - ControlledInput for username and email
   - ControlledRadioGroup for role selection
   - Conditional ControlledInput for otherInfo (v-if form.values.role === 'contributor')
   - ControlledCheckbox for newsletter
   - Conditional ControlledRadioGroup for frequency (v-if form.values.newsletter)
   - ControlledTextarea for bio
   - Form with FormFields and FormActions wrapper
   - Button as submit action

Both files compiled successfully with no TypeScript errors.

runs.output_code:
<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  Button,
  ControlledCheckbox,
  ControlledInput,
  ControlledRadioGroup,
  ControlledTextarea,
  Form,
  FormActions,
  FormFields,
} from "elements";
import { registrationSchema, registrationInitialValues, type RegistrationFormValues } from "../types";

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user", label: "User" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributor" },
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Monthly" },
];

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => {
    // Handle form submission
    return values;
  },
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form :initial-values="registrationInitialValues" :form-schema="registrationSchema" :actions="actions">
    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Enter your username"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="Enter your email"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Other Info"
        placeholder="Describe your contribution"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter === true"
        name="frequency"
        label="Email Frequency"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        orientation="horizontal"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Tell us about yourself..."
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">
      <Button type="submit" :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value">
        Submit
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

args.content:
<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  Button,
  Checkbox,
  ControlledCheckbox,
  ControlledInput,
  ControlledRadioGroup,
  ControlledTextarea,
  Form,
  FormActions,
  FormFields,
} from "elements";
import { registrationSchema, registrationInitialValues, type RegistrationFormValues } from "../types";

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user", label: "User" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributor" },
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Monthly" },
];

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (_values: RegistrationFormValues) => {
    // Handle form submission
  },
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form :initial-values="registrationInitialValues" :form-schema="registrationSchema" :actions="actions">
    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Enter your username"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="Enter your email"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Other Info"
        placeholder="Describe your contribution"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter === true"
        name="frequency"
        label="Email Frequency"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        orientation="horizontal"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Tell us about yourself..."
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">
      <Button type="submit" :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value">
        Submit
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  Button,
  ControlledCheckbox,
  ControlledInput,
  ControlledRadioGroup,
  ControlledTextarea,
  Form,
  FormActions,
  FormFields,
} from "elements";
import { registrationSchema, registrationInitialValues, type RegistrationFormValues } from "../types";

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user", label: "User" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributor" },
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Monthly" },
];

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => {
    // Handle form submission
    return values;
  },
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form :initial-values="registrationInitialValues" :form-schema="registrationSchema" :actions="actions">
    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Enter your username"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="Enter your email"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Other Info"
        placeholder="Describe your contribution"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter === true"
        name="frequency"
        label="Email Frequency"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        orientation="horizontal"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Tell us about yourself..."
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">
      <Button type="submit" :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value">
        Submit
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

   - bio (optional textarea)

2. `apps/web/src/registration/components/RegistrationForm.vue` - Vue SFC with:
   - ControlledInput for username, email, and conditional otherInfo
   - ControlledRadioGroup for role and conditional frequency
   - ControlledCheckbox for newsletter
   - ControlledTextarea for bio
   - v-if conditionals to show/hide fields based on form.values
   - All components imported from "elements" package
